Work through Learning Sequence Activities on your own, continuously — a few class
patterns to chant along with before each individual pattern, then your own turn,
genuinely graded by ear (just like the rhythm assessment tool), following along
with the notation for each pattern. Results stay hidden; nothing is saved. (Test
scope: only Rhythm Unit 1 is wired up so far.)

```{=html}
<div id="lsa-practice">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/lsa/lsa.css">

  <p class="lsa-practice-status" id="lsa-practice-status">
    Click Start, then allow microphone access when your browser asks.
  </p>
  <div class="lsa-practice-actions">
    <button type="button" id="lsa-practice-start" class="lsa-btn lsa-primary">▶ Start Practice</button>
  </div>
  <div class="lsa-practice-notation" id="notation"></div>
</div>

<!-- Off-screen: the real rhythm-assessment tool (mic + onset-detection grading),
     reused as-is so accuracy is genuinely evaluated -- results stay hidden, only
     #notation above is pulled out into view. -->
<div id="lsa-eval-shell" aria-hidden="true">
  <div id="flowStatus" class="flow nomic">Enable the mic to begin.</div>

  <div class="card">
    <div class="row">
      <div><label for="collection">Collection</label><select id="collection"></select></div>
      <div><label for="pattern">Pattern</label><select id="pattern"></select></div>
      <button id="next" type="button">Next</button>
      <button id="random" type="button">Random</button>
      <label class="cb"><input type="checkbox" id="shuffle"></label>
      <button id="play" type="button">Hear pattern</button>
      <input type="range" id="tempo" min="40" max="144" value="90">
      <span id="tempoVal"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="score-row">
    <div class="score-pane">
      <div id="performedCard" class="hidden"><div id="performedNotation"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cols">
  <div class="col">
    <div class="card">
      <button id="mic" class="primary">Enable mic</button>
      <button id="record" disabled>Record attempt</button>
      <button id="continuous" disabled>Continuous mode</button>
      <span id="beatdot"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div id="captureSlot">
        <div id="capturing" class="muted hidden"></div>
        <div class="bar hidden" id="progwrap"><div id="prog"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div id="resultArea"></div>
      <div id="timelineWrap">
        <div id="timeline"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col">
    <div class="card" id="recCard">
      <audio id="player" controls></audio>
      <a id="download" class="btn"></a>
      <div class="muted" id="recMeta"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="sessionCard">
      <a id="sessionDownload" class="btn hidden"></a>
      <a id="sessionSrt" class="btn hidden"></a>
      <div class="muted" id="sessionMeta"></div>
    </div>
    <details class="card" id="options">
      <summary>Options &amp; diagnostics</summary>
      <select id="tol">
        <option value="60">60</option>
        <option value="100" selected>100</option>
        <option value="150">150</option>
      </select>
      <select id="countin">
        <option value="2">2</option>
        <option value="4" selected>4</option>
      </select>
      <select id="sens">
        <option value="0.04">High</option>
        <option value="0.06" selected>Medium</option>
        <option value="0.10">Low</option>
      </select>
      <label class="cb"><input type="checkbox" id="metroAudible" checked></label>
      <label class="cb"><input type="checkbox" id="metroVisual" checked></label>
      <button id="calibrate" type="button" disabled></button>
      <span class="muted" id="calResult"></span>
      <div id="level"><div id="levelbar"></div><div id="thresh"></div></div>
      <div class="muted" id="liveCount"></div>
    </details>
  </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythm-assessment/abc-rhythm.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/curriculum.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/notation.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/self-lsa-sequence.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/self-lsa-notated-app.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/session-log.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythm-assessment/app.js?v=7"></script>
```
